sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ فِي هَذِهِ الشَّرِكَةِ كَفَرِيقٍ وَاحِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici u ovoj kompaniji rade kao jedan tim.
sentences.translationEn: The employees in this company work as one team.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَاوَنُ الْجَمِيعُ لِتَحْقِيقِ الْأَهْدَافِ الْمَطْلُوبَةِ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ.
sentences.translation: Svi sarađuju kako bi postigli tražene ciljeve na vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone cooperates to achieve the required goals on time.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الْخُبَرَاءُ زُمَلَاءَهُمُ الْجُدُدَ فِي تَعَلُّمِ مَهَامِّ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci pomažu svojim novim kolegama u učenju radnih zadataka.
sentences.translationEn: Experts help their new colleagues learn work tasks.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّعَاوُنُ يَجْعَلُ بِيئَةَ الْعَمَلِ مُرِيحَةً وَمُنْتِجَةً.
sentences.translation: Ova saradnja čini radno okruženje ugodnim i produktivnim.
sentences.translationEn: This cooperation makes the work environment comfortable and productive.
